{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320174439BCCBE65C56082BC6445C\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618229266065654552","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"支持新书，刚开始放了三个二创，后面正常的走主线，里面主角还有直播间弹幕与原神角色弹幕，还是蛮有趣的[爱慕]里面似乎荧已经走到了稻妻好像[思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773759638,"group_id":"7604092352956730392","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"谁问你了？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+WS3KAy6wZZ91AA+vkT4xWeOUcMduLN51iRu6kfwpPo","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f405f62571fe4242a99362ea99093ecb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776534397\u0026x-signature=o3iHPEWm2299ZX%2BSVIrnR9rQSMk%3D","user_id":"2914156986249708","user_name":"口阿羡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2914156986249708","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7604092352956730392","book_info":{"abstract":"（主角纯纯乐子人＋主线＋恶搞二创）\n夏天在直播中无意中刷到原神恶搞二创，于是成为了一个踏入提瓦特的萌新旅行者，在一次次中无意透露未来剧情发展以及信息量爆大的二创视频中对于提瓦特大陆会有何等影响。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o98e2bf2249042a3f37921fb3a9d292d5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"夏洛尘","author_id":"","book_id":"7604092352956730392","book_name":"原神：开局二创雷到众人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8e0e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4684人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026ge
